description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a preflight stage that runs a kubeconform job extending the hidden .kubeconform template. The job must execute the exact script commands in order: `kubectl version --client=true --output=json`, `helm version --template='{{.Version}}'`, `helm plugin list`, `helm repo add gitlab https://charts.gitlab.io`, `helm repo add jetstack https://charts.jetstack.io`, `helm dependency update`, `echo "$HELM_DEFAULT_SETTINGS" | tee ./template_settings.yaml`, `echo "$HELM_SETTINGS" | tee -a ./template_settings.yaml`, `echo "${KUBECONFORM_SCHEMA_LOCATION:-default}"`, and `helm kubeconform --strict --summary -f ./template_settings.yaml --kubernetes-version $KUBE_VERSION --schema-location "${KUBECONFORM_SCHEMA_LOCATION:-default}" --schema-location "$KUBE_CRD_SCHEMA_URL" --output json .`. It should define the HELM_SETTINGS variable with the provided multi‑line YAML, run always, and be triggered only when $PIPELINE_TYPE matches `_MR_PIPELINE`, `_BRANCH_PIPELINE` or equals `NIGHTLY_PIPELINE`. The job must run in parallel across the matrix of KUBE_VERSION values 1.31.9, 1.32.5, 1.33.1, and 1.34.0.
